root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to environment/external dependencies (resource contention, ports, or real cluster timing). This PR stabilizes it by: config: fix the unstable test `TestPDConfHandler`.

evidence: diff makes timing deterministic by injecting a controllable `timeAfter` channel and waiting for register/reload events; also moves suite to SerialSuites (config/config_handler_test.go, config/config_test.go).
